name: Edge cases — single paper, minimal chunks, boundary conditions

setup.description: Tests behavior with minimal input: a single paper with only 2 chunks. Verifies that artifact generators handle 1-paper cases gracefully, the system doesn't crash on sparse data, and scoring still works correctly. Also tests an unanswerable question with this limited context.

papers.title: DAPA-HF: Dapagliflozin in Patients with Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction

mockChunks.text: Dapagliflozin reduced the composite of worsening heart failure or cardiovascular death (HR 0.74; 95% CI 0.65-0.85; P<0.001). The number needed to treat was 21 over a median follow-up of 18.2 months.
Enrolled patients were aged ≥18 years with NYHA class II-IV heart failure and LVEF ≤40%. Patients were randomized 1:1 to dapagliflozin 10mg or placebo.

queries.query: Create a study guide from this paper
expectedBehavior: Study guide generated from a single paper
Contains Key Concepts, Main Findings, Methodology, Review Questions, Key Takeaways

queries.query: What were the renal outcomes in this trial?
expectedBehavior: Acknowledges that renal outcomes are NOT in the provided sources
May reference what IS available (cardiac outcomes)
Cites available sources if referencing them

qualityCriteria: Single-paper study guide is complete and well-formed
No fabricated data from other trials
System works correctly with minimal chunk set
